sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) the part opposite, in front. Hab 1:9, קָדִימָה “forwards” (vorwärts).

(2) the east, the eastern quarter of the sky, i.q. קֶדֶם, Eze 47:18 48:1 . (Compare אָחֹור No. 2.) Hence poet. for the fuller רוּחַ קָדִים east wind, by far the most violent in western Asia and the adjoining seas, Psa 48:8 Job 27:21 Isa 27:8 Jer 18:17 Eze 27:26 scorching plants and herbage, Gen 41:6, 23 Gen 41:23 Jon 4:8. Metaph. i.q. רוּחַ of anything which is vain and at the same time pernicious, Hos 12:2 Job 15:2.
